    L

    lookupMojo(String, File) - Method in class com.github.dantwining.whitespace.MojoTestHarness
    Looks up a mojo by goal name from the plugin configuration in the given POM file.

    M

    MojoTestHarness - Class in com.github.dantwining.whitespace
    The Class MojoTestHarness wraps AbstractMojoTestCase and exposes its protected methods publicly so that JUnit 5 test classes can use delegation instead of inheritance.
    MojoTestHarness() - Constructor for class com.github.dantwining.whitespace.MojoTestHarness
    Instantiates a new mojo test harness.

    R

    resolveTestFile(String) - Method in class com.github.dantwining.whitespace.MojoTestHarness
    Returns the test file relative to the project base directory using PlexusTestCase.getTestFile(String).

    S

    setUp() - Method in class com.github.dantwining.whitespace.MojoTestHarness
    Initializes the Plexus container.
    setVariableValueToObject(Object, String, T) - Method in class com.github.dantwining.whitespace.MojoTestHarness
    Sets a field value on the given object using reflection.

    T

    tearDown() - Method in class com.github.dantwining.whitespace.MojoTestHarness
    Shuts down the Plexus container.
    TrimMojoHarnessTest - Class in com.github.dantwining.whitespace
    The Class TrimMojoHarnessTest uses the Maven Plugin Testing Harness to test TrimMojo.

    Instantiates a new trim mojo harness test.
